PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carlo Campobello appeared via zoom for and with Tracy Greene (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding defects in the publication, that creditors did file, that nobody has filed objections, and that is a lost will. The Court waives any defects and grants the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and Letters of Administration WWA.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2024 Continued To Nov-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: John O'Grady appeared via zoom for Oscar Fonseca (petitioner).
Carlo Campobello appeared via zoom for Trace Greene (petitioner).

Mr. O'Grady expressed to the Court, that his client doesn't have the resources to pursue his petition and is asking to withdraw the petition. The Court orders Mr. Fonseca petition be withdrawn, and letters of special administration be extended to November 6, 2024. The matter is continued to November 6, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
